title: Deployment Strategist - Europe
key_evidence: Explicit technical bar: 'Basic proficiency in Python and familiarity with API integration, sufficient to prototype, demo, and communicate credibly with engineering teams' + 'familiarity with common LLM, tooling and AI agent frameworks'. Some job boards list this exact role as 'Forward Deployed Engineer - Strategist - Europe'.

Responsibilities: collaborate daily with customers' engineering AND executive teams to get agents to production; work alongside Forward Deployed Software Engineers. This is a quasi-engineering, enterprise-deployment role.

Ryan's CV: NO formal programming languages, no professional SWE. Claude-Code agent-building shows AI-tool literacy and could plausibly cover 'basic Python/API to prototype/demo', but this is the weakest evidence point and the role's hardest gate. A_requirements scored low/honest.

ElevenLabs is extremely hot (voice-AI unicorn, heavy hype) and the role is one of ~30 global Deployment Strategist reqs — high visibility, very high applicant volume, many with genuine FDE/Python backgrounds = very low competition score.
Remote-global / Europe posting widens the applicant pool further (not London-exclusive).
Large org with recruiting team + technical screen — an associate-level non-engineer is likely filtered at the Python/FDE gate before human read.
Conversion upside if hired (clear rounds, well-funded, strong comp) but the requirements gate makes reaching that stage unlikely.
biggest_lever: Position Claude-Code agent-building as hands-on prototyping/demo ability with LLM/agent frameworks, plus customer-and-executive-facing communication strength, to argue 'credible with engineering teams' despite no formal SWE.
biggest_risk: Hard technical gate (Python + API integration + FDE-adjacent) that Ryan does not formally meet, combined with massive applicant volume at a hype company — high chance of automatic technical screen-out.
apply_verdict: Low-priority stretch; only apply with a strong demonstrable agent-building portfolio to counter the Python/FDE gate, otherwise deprioritise.
recency_note: Posted 34 days ago (Ashby publishedAt 2026-05-06) — 4-8wk band -> base 32, -5 for hot brand ($11B voice-AI unicorn) + Europe-wide pool widening volume. Confirmed live (also listed as 'Forward Deployed Engineer - Strategist - Europe'). Mildly aged; callback essentially flat 34->31. No applicant count visible.
momentum_signals: FUNDING SPIKE (POSITIVE): Series D third close 2026-05-05 (BlackRock, NVIDIA, Salesforce, Deutsche Telekom, Wellington); $500M Series D at $11B (Feb 2026); $100M tender offer. Source: elevenlabs.io/blog/series-d, TechAfrica News.
REVENUE/HEADCOUNT (STRONG POSITIVE): $500M ARR in 4 months of 2026 (from $350M EOY 2025); headcount ~530 -> ~904 by May 2026. Source: elevenlabs.io/blog/500m-arr, Crustdata 2026.

THIS FUNCTION IS THE FUNDED PRIORITY (POSITIVE): Series D capital explicitly directed at 'locally embedded GTM teams' for enterprise adoption across Europe (London/Warsaw/Dublin/Paris/Berlin) — Deployment Strategist / Forward Deployed sits squarely in that funded enterprise-deployment push, ~30 global reqs in the family. Source: elevenlabs.io/blog/series-d.
TREATMENT CAVEAT: 151 live roles + technical FDE/Python gate; company momentum elite (green) but Ryan faces a hard technical screen before the strong momentum can help.
